holdings.infoBox: KEAT is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares 0-5 Year TIPS Bond ETF stock at 30.47%, Barrick Mining at 4.91%, Agnico Eagle Mines at 4.55%, Oceaneering International at 4.37%, and Vodafone Group at 4.34%.

overview.description: The Keating Active ETF (KEAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of equity securities, focusing on US-listed companies but may search for investments globally if opportunities are considered attractive. The fund may invest in companies of all capitalizations, seeking total return KEAT was launched on Mar 27, 2024 and is issued by Keating.
